Close Shot.description: Ability to shoot when standing still out to 10 feet from the basket. Determines effectiveness with post hooks, post shots, standing alley-oops, and putback layups.

Driving Layup.description: Ability to successfully complete regular, contact, alley-oop, and putback layup attempts while moving towards the basket.

Driving Dunk.description: Ability to successfully complete regular, contact, alley-oop, and putback dunk attempts while driving towards the basket.

Standing Dunk.description: Ability to successfully complete regular, contact, alley-oop, and putback dunk attempts while standing still under the basket. Crucial for big men.

Post Control.description: Determines success when performing spins, drives, drop steps, and other moves from the post position. Combines with strength and size to back down defenders.

Post Fade.description: Determines a player's effectiveness and success rate when executing fadeaway shots from the post position.

Post Hook.description: Determines a player's ability to successfully execute hook shots while operating from the post position.

Draw Foul.description: Determines the ability to bait or naturally attract shooting and blocking fouls from defenders when driving to the basket or taking close shots.

Hands.description: Determines a player's ability to secure and control the basketball. Influences effectiveness in catching passes and cleanly finishing plays.

Mid Range.description: Ability to make shots of all types from mid-range distance, including pull-ups, step-backs, and post fadeaway attempts.

3PT.description: Determines the player's ability to successfully make shots of all types from three-point distance.

Free Throw.description: Ability to successfully make free throw attempts. Higher ratings broaden the release window, making the shot timing significantly easier.

Shot IQ.description: Governs shot selection. High Shot IQ helps AI players identify open or balanced looks and avoid forcing heavily contested heaves or driving blindly into traffic.

Pass Accuracy.description: Ability to throw the ball accurately in all situations (bounce, chest, lob, overhead, flashy, alley-oop), especially under defensive pressure.

Ball Handle.description: Determines skill and control while dribbling. Dictates the advanced moves allowed and controls how well a player secures the ball against steal attempts.

Speed With Ball.description: Determines how fast a player can launch into a dribble from a standstill, run, or sprint while actively controlling the ball.

Pass IQ.description: Governs AI court vision and decision-making, influencing how effectively a player identifies the best passing options while minimizing turnover risks.

Pass Vision.description: The player's ability to quickly recognize and anticipate passing opportunities across the court for open teammates, reducing turnover-heavy animations.

Interior Defense.description: Ability to defend the paint effectively both on and off the ball, lock down opponents down low, and contest shots near the rim.

Perimeter Defense.description: Effectiveness in guarding opponents on the perimeter. Influences lateral containment, staying in front of drivers, contesting outside shots, and preventing cuts.

Steal.description: Ability to intercept or deflect passes in lanes and cleanly take the ball away from opposing ball-handlers in all situations.

Block.description: Determines the probability of successfully contesting or blocking all types of shots, particularly near the basket.

Pass Perception.description: Determines a player's ability to anticipate and react to passing lanes, leading to quicker, more responsive interception and disruption animations.

Defensive Consistency.description: Maintains defensive focus over time. Prevents players from getting caught flat-footed, blowing rotation assignments, or losing badge effectiveness.

Help Defense IQ.description: Dictates how smartly a player provides help defense, collapsing into the paint to contest driving layups or rotating to cover open perimeter shooters.

Offensive Consistency.description: Dictates how quickly a player gets hot, how long they sustain it, and how heavily shooting percentages drop during a slumping stretch.

Offensive Rebound.description: Ability to track and secure offensive rebounds. Combines with vertical to unlock elite reach content and controls boxing out or navigating around box outs.

Defensive Rebound.description: Ability to track and secure defensive rebounds. Combines with vertical to unlock elite reach content and controls boxing out or navigating around box outs.

Speed.description: Determines how fast a player can run or sprint around the court without the ball during transitions, fast breaks, and off-ball tracking.

Agility.description: Governs off-ball bursts, quick direction changes, cuts, and defensive lateral movement needed to stay in front of shifty ball-handlers.

Strength.description: Controls physical contact battles. Dictates success when absorbing contact, holding ground defensively, backing down opponents, or resisting a post back-down.

Vertical.description: Determines leaping ability. Acts as a gatekeeper for elite dunk animations and pairs with rebounding/blocking attributes to reach peak ball heights.

Stamina.description: Represents the player's total energy pool. Low stamina triggers fatigue, which drastically reduces speed, attribute ratings, and shot execution success.

Hustle.description: Dictates reaction time, effort, and tenacity when diving for loose balls, securing 50/50 possessions, or saving errant plays from going out of bounds.
